K2 & Lendor Burton Elephant Charge 2016

1 October 2016 · 📍 Chongwe River

18 Entries
7 Completed
39% Finish rate
$63,205 Raised
10 Checkpoints
5× Gauntlet mult.
Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×5 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

LHMP — A new entry in a borrowed car without a GPS and still managed to complete nearly all of the course and showed some fantastic charging.

Most Shafted

Took to the river and nearly made it but ended up with a drowned engine and a broken con-rod.
